We Bring It To You

Delivery Services

We offer delivery for bulky construction materials to sites across the Nairobi East region. Request a quote and we'll get it to you.

🚛

Bulky Items Only

Delivery is available exclusively for heavy or bulky goods — cement, steel, timber, iron sheets, sand, ballast, and similar materials.

📍

Nairobi East Coverage

We deliver across Kamulu, Ruai, Joska, Malaa, Utawala, Embakasi, and surrounding areas of the Eastern Bypass corridor.

📋

Order In Advance

Place your order online or by phone at least a day in advance. We confirm delivery date and fee before dispatch.

💬

WhatsApp Coordination

Once your order is confirmed, we keep you updated via WhatsApp on delivery timing and status.

📦 Request Delivery Quote

Book a Delivery

Who We Are

About Monross Hardware

MONROSS H/W LTDEst. King'oris · Nairobi

Monross Hardware (Kamulu Imports – Monross H/W Ltd) is a full-service hardware store located in King'oris along the Eastern Bypass in Nairobi. We serve contractors, developers, and homeowners across the Nairobi East region with quality construction materials and building supplies.

Our stock covers everything from structural materials like cement, steel, and timber to finishing items including paints, plumbing fittings, and electrical components — making us a one-stop shop for any construction or renovation project.

We offer reliable delivery of bulky materials directly to your site, so you can focus on building while we handle logistics.
